10.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - blue | 2 Pieces - BIKE24
10.evidenceText: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - purple | 2 Pieces. 11,76 €*
10.extractionRationale: Single retail price found: 11,76 € (converted from German decimal notation to 11.76) for BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core (2 Pieces) on BIKE24 German site. This is the only price mentioned in the evidence for the corecap product.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless-Ventil - 2er Set - 40 mm | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct product URLs identified: p1859948.html (40mm), p1859949.html (60mm), p1859950.html (80mm). Source 2 is a category page, Source 3 is an inner tube accessory.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for Clik Valve products only. Excluded the category/series page (Source 2) and the inner tube accessory listing (Source 3). The three distinct product variations (40mm, 60mm, 80mm tubeless valve sets) each have unique URLs and represent distinct product listings.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - copper | 2 Pieces
30.evidenceText: Product description and features section provided. No stock status indicators (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) are mentioned in the extracted content.
30.extractionRationale: The provided content excerpt from the product page contains the product description and features but does not include any stock status information. Without explicit stock indicators in the available text, stock status cannot be determined.

56.evidenceText: Four distinct Schwalbe inner tube models identified: (1) 16"/18" - 28/37-340/355 | Clik Valve (SCV) 40mm, (2) No. 17 | 28-47/622-635 | Clik Valve (SCV), (3) Nr. 7 | 20" - 40/62-406 | Clik Valve (SCV) 40mm, (4) Nr. 10 | 24" - 40/62-507 | Clik Valve (SCV) 40mm
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models/SKUs with Clik valve from the four sources provided. Each source represents a unique tube size (16"/18", 28"/700C, 20", 24"), resulting in 4 distinct models. Only inner tubes were counted, excluding any valves, conversion kits, or accessories.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3372.15 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the value 3372.15 directly from the source text which explicitly states the aluminum price in USD/Tonne. The price is already in the requested unit (USD per metric ton), so no conversion was needed.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: Source shows 1,793.99 for Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest. This is expressed in cents per pound (standard commodity premium unit). Converted to USD/lb by dividing by 100: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = 17.94 USD/lb
